title: Software Update - "1" or "2" tag on the tab if any component is outdated
scenario: Software Update tab displays numbered badge indicating count of outdated components (headset, stand, charge case)
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Ensure at least one Poly audio device component (headset, stand, or charge case) has an available firmware update.
Navigate to the Software Update tab (e.g., via Home → Software Update or Account → Software Update).
Observe the numbered tag displayed on the Software Update tab icon or label.
If one component has an available update, verify the tag shows "1".
If two components have available updates, verify the tag shows "2".
expected: The Software Update tab displays a numbered tag (e.g., "1" or "2") indicating the count of components (headset, stand, charge case) with an available update. When one component is outdated, a "1" tag appears. When two components are outdated, a "2" tag appears.
